recipes.name: Lemon Herb Chickpea Bowl
recipes.description: Bright, protein-rich bowl with chickpeas, quinoa, and citrus herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Add quinoa, chickpeas, tomatoes, and cucumber; toss well.
Fold in chopped parsley and adjust seasoning.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
